summary: M410 — priest overheal fix. Two bugs: (1) AI selection at low priest level had Mend as the only usable skill, so the default-personality fallback chain landed on usableSkills[0]=Mend even when nobody was hurt — now skips heal/buff fallbacks unless someone actually needs healing; (2) the 85% overheal-skip gate in _executeSkill required actor.autoBuild.auto_active or non-hero, so a regular AI hero priest bypassed it entirely — now triggers whenever the cast isn't a manual-mode hero. Combined: priests stop spamming Mend at full HP.
